creator: michaelfigley@yahoo.com
text:
I've attempted booting from CD the last several dev releases -
the bootloader sprite spins a few times then hangs!

The hardware:

Tyan SG2912G2NR
8GB RAM
(2) Dual Core Opterons 2214HE
(8) 1TB WD Drives
lastest BIOS v 4.00

The CDs Boot fine on another amd64 system with one dual-core CPU:
ASUS 8-VX, 1GB RAM

anybody else see this?


Cheers!
mike

How-To-Repeat: see above
